announcements.title: Our Mod Updates Have Gone Live!
announcements.summary: You can now download the most advanced version of the Madfutx Mod
announcements.body:
We are so excited for you to try our brand new mod! This is just the start of the features we will be implementing.

You can grab the VIP version of this Mod if you'd like to play online, save your progress and use our trading mod features by clicking the button below.

Thank you all for the support and making this possible.

announcements.title: Welcome to MFX Mod
announcements.summary: Pay attention to announcements, news drops almost everyday!
announcements.body:
Welcome to the BEST mod ever released, seriously!

I hope you make the most of all the features i've taken time to build for you, it's been so fun to create experiences for you in MadFUT to enjoy.

I'll be posting announcements frequently, so be sure to check here everyday!
